Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Dana L. Tom, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP (415-524-4300), counsel for defendant/moving party
